addition.item: Added thumbnail cache system for improved frontend gallery performance
Added dedicated thumbnail folders per gallery
Added per-gallery thumbnail width and height settings
Added global default thumbnail settings for newly created galleries
Added thumbnail generation during new gallery photo upload workflow
Added on-demand thumbnail generation for existing Active galleries
Added on-demand thumbnail generation for existing Legacy galleries
Added automatic missing thumbnail regeneration support
Added thumbnail cache versioning based on gallery thumbnail settings
Added thumbnail retention and cleanup settings

change.item: Improved gallery grid performance by serving optimized thumbnails instead of larger gallery images
Improved bandwidth usage for image-heavy gallery pages
Improved scalability for large Joomla gallery installations
Improved Cloudflare and CDN friendliness for gallery frontend rendering
Improved filesystem organization by separating original gallery images from generated thumbnails
Improved self-healing behavior when thumbnail files are missing
Existing Active and Legacy galleries now build thumbnail cache progressively only when requested on the frontend
New gallery uploads now create thumbnails during save/upload operations

note.item: Performance-focused release for high-traffic and image-heavy Joomla websites
Existing galleries are not processed during installation or upgrade
No mass thumbnail generation is performed during update
Thumbnail cache is created progressively as galleries are accessed
Recommended update for all DevArt Gallery installations

fix.item: Fixed critical Joomla 6 administrator fatal error in New Gallery workflow caused by incorrect model architecture
Fixed New Gallery model to use proper Joomla AdminModel form workflow
Fixed broken gallery save workflow for newly created galleries
Fixed broken administrator Back / Cancel toolbar behavior in New Gallery view
Fixed missing administrator language string COM_DEVARTGALLERY_ALIAS

change.item: Improved Joomla 6 administrator form compatibility for gallery creation workflow
Improved production stability for administrator gallery management
Improved reliability of New Gallery create/save operations

note.item: Recommended update for all DevArt Gallery v1.0.9 installations
No frontend behavior changes or feature modifications in this release

fix.item: Fixed component configuration parameter handling when Joomla stores component params in nested JSON format
Fixed Dashboard showing fallback or incorrect gallery paths instead of configured values
Fixed Legacy Archive Directory display inconsistencies in administrator dashboard
Fixed Active Gallery Directory display inconsistencies in administrator dashboard
Fixed Legacy Index rebuild using incorrect directory values in specific installations
Fixed Active Index rebuild using incorrect directory values in specific installations
Fixed indexing behavior when configuration values were correctly saved but incorrectly read by internal component logic

change.item: Improved compatibility with different Joomla component parameter storage behaviors
Improved dashboard configuration accuracy across installations
Improved gallery indexing reliability for production environments
Improved migration safety for legacy gallery deployments
Improved internal configuration loading consistency

note.item: This release focuses on configuration reliability, indexing stability and production consistency
Recommended update for all previous DevArt Gallery releases

fix.item: Fixed Legacy Archive Directory custom path handling when changed from default values
Fixed Active Gallery Directory custom path handling when changed from default values
Fixed dashboard directory cards showing incorrect default paths after configuration changes
Fixed Legacy Index rebuild ignoring custom Legacy Archive Directory settings
Fixed Active Index rebuild ignoring custom Active Gallery Directory settings
Fixed legacy indexing conflicts when Legacy Archive Directory includes the Active Gallery Directory

change.item: Improved path normalization and component parameter loading consistency
Improved migration safety when legacy galleries are indexed from broader directories
Improved dashboard accuracy for custom gallery path deployments
Improved Joomla Update metadata consistency for production releases

note.item: This release focused on custom path handling, indexing reliability and migration safety
Recommended update for users of earlier initial releases

addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Image Gallery component with modern MVC architecture
Added active managed gallery system
Added legacy gallery indexing with read-only compatibility support
Added portable path-based shortcode support for legacy and active galleries
Added frontend gallery display module
Added content plugin for article gallery rendering
Added editor button for easy gallery shortcode insertion
Added popup image viewer support
Added responsive frontend gallery layouts
Added Normal Grid and Masonry frontend display modes
Added gallery management interface
Added Manage Photos interface with pagination
Added Scan Existing Photos support
Added automatic image indexing system
Added support for JPG, PNG and WEBP image uploads
Added automatic image optimization workflow
Added strict filename sanitization policy
Added optional watermark support per gallery
Added Joomla menu item integration for direct gallery frontend pages
Added Joomla ACL permissions support
Added Keep Data on Uninstall option
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support

change.item: Gallery architecture designed specifically for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+
Legacy gallery compatibility implemented without modifying historical gallery folders
Frontend rendering kept lightweight to minimize template conflicts
CSS and JavaScript namespaced for safer third-party compatibility
Manage Photos optimized with pagination for larger galleries
Gallery indexing optimized for controlled batch operations
Modern service provider and MVCComponent architecture used throughout

security.item: Added SQL injection protection using Joomla database APIs and parameterized queries
Added XSS protection through proper output escaping
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added path traversal protection for filesystem operations
Added strict filename validation for safer uploads
Added ACL enforcement for administrator operations

note.item: Initial public release of DevArt Image Gallery for Joomla 6
Designed for editorial, news and high-traffic Joomla websites
Always test on a staging environment before production deployment
